title: cleome amblyocarpa var. glandulosa
intro: Cleome amblyocarpa var. glandulosa, also known as the glandular spider flower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Cleome genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds in its leaves, stems, and flowers. Traditionally, Cleome amblyocarpa var. glandulosa has been used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, thanks to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Cleome amblyocarpa var. glandulosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to promote wound healing, alleviate pain, and support the immune system.
